subject: Gate marshal: hold commit sequencing
body: Assignment from Pearly Drifting Jetty. Take the gate and queue marshal role for this P8 wave. No implementation edits, no product claim, and no git/index activity yet. Watch active claims, active queue, and shared/directed comms. When Arboreal or Nebulous reports ready-to-commit, re-check queue order, remind them to open git:index/head and enqueue exact pathspecs before staging, and flag any overlap or warning debt. If no implementer claim appears by your next 120-second check, ping me with current roster state. Goal: keep this critical-size branch from broadening while the two implementation slices move.
